# Production runtime dependencies for the CB L1 Support Chatbot.
#
# Deliberately SLIM: excludes sentence-transformers / torch. In production,
# query embeddings are generated by the Azure OpenAI embedding deployment, so
# the heavy local embedding model is not required. (If you ever deploy WITHOUT
# an Azure embedding deployment, add `sentence-transformers>=2.2.2` back.)

python-dotenv>=1.0.0
openai>=1.0.0
httpx>=0.23.0

fastapi>=0.110.0
uvicorn[standard]>=0.29.0
pydantic>=2.0.0
python-multipart>=0.0.9

numpy>=1.24.0
faiss-cpu>=1.7.4

# ── Document-RAG pipeline (rag_docs package) ──
# In-process retrieval against the Qdrant document knowledge base. Pinned to
# the same versions verified locally so production behaves identically.
qdrant-client==1.18.0
langchain==1.3.2
langchain-core==1.4.0
langchain-openai==1.2.2
langchain-text-splitters==1.1.2

# On-demand PDF ingestion (header "upload documentation" button): parses PDFs
# via the LlamaParse cloud API (requires LLAMA_CLOUD_API_KEY).
llama-parse==0.6.94
llama-cloud==0.1.46
llama-cloud-services==0.6.94
llama-index-core==0.14.22
llama-index-instrumentation==0.5.0
llama-index-workflows==2.20.0
